name: Tafea (Vanuatu)

colors.symbolism: the cross and the five stars

description: A blue field with a green canton bearing a black shield charged with a yellow cross, and five yellow five-pointed stars for the province's five islands (Tanna, Aniwa, Futuna, Erromango and Aneityum).
history: Tafea is the southernmost province of Vanuatu, its name an acronym of its five islands: Tanna, Aniwa, Futuna, Erromango and Aneityum.

features.role: green canton with a black shield and yellow cross
five stars for the five islands
